title: nepeta henanensis
intro: Nepeta henanensis, also known as Chinese peppermint or Chinese catmint, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta henanensis include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Nepeta henanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine in combination with other herbs to treat various health conditions.
